name: chr1_1p36_subtelomeric_SD_cluster
description: 1p36 distal subtelomeric segmental-duplication cluster covering the last ~3 Mb of 1p. Contains olfactory-receptor sub-cluster, dispersed SD blocks shared with other human subtelomeres (3p, 4p, 8p, 16p), and tandem duplicons associated with the recurrent 1p36 deletion syndrome.

architecture.internal_structure: Telomere-proximal SD modules of 5-50 kb at 90-98% identity shared with other subtelomeric regions; interspersed unique segments harbouring SKI, GABRD, PRDM16, CHD5.
